grant_title: Grants to Expand Youth Programming Citywide
project_area: Youth programming, STEAM education, mental health, and equity-centered community engagement
demographic_requirements: Focus on youth and families in Jersey City, with an emphasis on equity and community engagement
eligibility_summary: Open to Jersey City-based nonprofit organizations with programs addressing opioid prevention through STEAM, youth mental health, and equity-centered initiatives. Applicants must demonstrate strong program design, measurable impact, and organizational capacity.
